name: Rsync Data Transfer
summary: Transfer datasets with rsync dry-runs, resumable options, and validation hooks.
description: This skill helps users plan and run rsync transfers with conservative defaults, dry-run review, log capture, checksum-aware options, and a post-transfer validation checklist.

inputs.name: source_path
inputs.description: Source path or rsync source specification.

inputs.name: destination_path
inputs.description: Destination path or rsync destination specification.

inputs.name: run_transfer
inputs.description: Opt-in flag that changes the example from dry-run planning to actual transfer.

outputs.name: transfer_plan
outputs.description: Dry-run or executed rsync command and log file.

outputs.name: transfer_log
outputs.description: Rsync output suitable for review and support.

examples.title: Plan or run an rsync transfer

tests.description: Validate the manifest and referenced examples.
Run the example in dry-run mode against two small user-owned directories and review the log before RUN_TRANSFER=1.
